location: Dropped by fire-sword-wielding Man-Serpent enemies patrolling the walkways of Volcano Manor, just north of the Temple of Eiglay Site of Grace — reachable via the wooden elevator outside.
tactics: From Temple of Eiglay grace, take the wooden elevator up; two Man-Serpents on this path carry the blade — one down a hallway, another through the first archway on the right
Man-Serpents swing their flaming curved swords in fast, wide arcs — bait an attack and punish the recovery rather than trading hits
Drop chance is very low (about 1%), so raising Discovery (Arcane investment, Silver Scarab talisman, Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot) is close to essential for a reasonable farm
Fast traveling cancels the Silver-Pickled Fowl Foot's buff, so walk back to reset the area instead of teleporting
lore: Its blade is cast directly from Mt. Gelmir's own molten lava — a weapon of the man-serpents that no human craftsman could replicate, carrying the fire of its making into every strike.

builds.name: Strength/Faith fire build
builds.why: D-tier scaling split between Strength and Faith, plus a large chunk of innate Fire damage, lets it slot into a Strength/Faith fire build without needing an Ash of War.
